use_cases: Displaying product or service features in a clean card layout
Highlighting key benefits with visual hierarchy
Showcasing capabilities in landing pages or marketing sections
Organizing feature comparisons in pricing or product pages
Creating scannable content sections with icons and descriptions
ai_summary: A minimalist feature card component for showcasing product features or benefits. Built with Radix UI primitives and Tailwind CSS for a clean, modern presentation. Includes support for icons, descriptions, and call-to-action buttons. Designed for SaaS landing pages, product showcases, and feature comparison sections.
